caption:
This Bali-inspired viewing deck in Silay is literally a hidden gem! 

📍Pugad Viewing Deck
⚠️It’s hidden in the mountains of Patag, farther off the concrete road. So if you’re into peaceful and scenic places, it’s worth the trip. Just make sure your car is suitable for mountainous terrain. 
🍛 Pugad serves native coffee, breakfast, and light meals. Advance reservation required. 
🎟️ 150 PHP

Who will you bring here? Tag them in the comments. 💕
